title: OFSI General licence - INT/2025/5855272
body: " OFSI General licence - INT/2025/5855272 OFSI General licence - INT/2025/5855272 Publication notice   On 21 February 2025, OFSI issued General Licence INT/2025/5855272 under regulation 64 of the Russia (Sanctions) (EU Exit) Regulations 2019 (“the Russia Regulations”) which allows International Organisations to receive Permitted Payments transferred from an account held with Gazprombank (DP). "
